overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic neon-lit city plaza at dusk. The scene features towering skyscrapers, industrial piping, holographic advertisements, and cherry blossom trees lining the pedestrian walkway toward a bright light source.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with graffiti art and light installation

events.description: camera moves closer to the vending machine and begins panning left toward the industrial pipes

agents.ego_description: walking past a graffiti-covered wall featuring a white skeleton mural and a cylindrical light installation with shifting colors

entered.detail: large wall with white skeleton graffiti and skull artwork
cylindrical structure with shifting neon lights cycling through green, yellow, red, and blue
short flight of concrete stairs leading up to the left
rusted metal railing along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered urban walkway featuring a prominent wall with white skeleton graffiti. A cylindrical light installation with shifting neon colors sits near concrete steps. The area is enclosed with metal railings and has a gritty, industrial aesthetic with no pedestrians present.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service corridor with massive ventilation infrastructure

events.description: camera tilts upward to examine the large industrial pipes and ventilation fans overhead
camera tilts back down to street level revealing the pedestrian walkway ahead

agents.ego_description: looking up at the massive industrial infrastructure while continuing to walk forward

entered.detail: massive black and red industrial pipes running vertically and horizontally along the building facade
row of large square ventilation fans mounted high on the wall
glowing pink and purple digital advertisement on the right wall
tree with distinctive pink foliage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a corridor dominated by massive industrial pipes and ventilation fans mounted high on the building. Digital billboards glow on the right wall. The camera tilts up to examine the infrastructure before returning to street level where a pink-leaved tree becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined pedestrian promenade with benches and digital advertising

events.description: pedestrian in blue jacket passes close to camera on the left side
passing the large advertisement billboard and approaching the open plaza archway

agents.ego_description: walking along a pedestrian path lined with pink cherry blossom trees and orange benches while navigating through moderate foot traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket and beige shirt walking toward camera while looking at a phone

entered.detail: bright orange benches lined along the right side of the walkway
massive architectural archway framing the bright light source ahead
large vertical billboard displaying 'NEW JOB? GET AN UPGRADE!' with a man's image

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wide pedestrian promenade lined with distinctive pink-leaved trees and orange benches. NPCs walk in opposing directions, including one in a blue jacket passing close by. Large digital billboards line the route, and a massive archway structure becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza with fountain and towering corporate skyscrapers

events.description: entering the brightly lit plaza area with strong backlight from the distant sun
fountain structure becomes visible in the center of the plaza

agents.ego_description: approaching a bright light source in the distance while crossing the open plaza with wet reflective pavement

entered.detail: open plaza with water features and wet reflective pavement
massive glass and steel skyscrapers towering on both sides
intense bright light shining through the archway between buildings

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast plaza with wet reflective pavement leading toward a blindingly bright light source between towering skyscrapers. A fountain structure sits in the center of the plaza. Massive holographic advertisements cover the building facades, and the area transitions from enclosed walkways to an open urban square with scattered pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gritty, enclosed industrial corridor into a vast, luminous urban plaza. It begins in a covered walkway marked by white skeleton graffiti and a shifting neon light installation, moving past concrete steps and metal railings. As the camera progresses, the environment shifts toward massive industrial pipes and ventilation fans, with the view tilting upward toward the infrastructure before spotting a pink-leaved tree in the distance. The scene then opens onto a wide pedestrian promenade lined with orange benches and cherry blossoms, where the camera weaves through NPCs and passes under glowing digital billboards. Finally, the path expands into a massive open square with wet, reflective pavement and a central fountain, leading toward a blinding light source framed by towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.
